# Security Policy

This code and its associated production web page are included in Mozilla’s web and services bug bounty program on HackerOne. If you find a security vulnerability, please submit it via the process outlined in the [program policy](https://hackerone.com/mozilla).

Please submit all security-related bugs through [HackerOne](https://hackerone.com/mozilla). Never submit security-related bugs through a Github Issue or by email.
